blended.narrative: Jay Peak is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,700 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
